title: Lemon Zesty Brazilian Pa9oca
description: A classic Brazilian dessert made with peanuts, coconut milk, and a hint of lemon zest. This creamy and rich dessert is perfect for warm weather or as a comforting treat anytime of the year.
instructions: Pulse the peanuts in a food processor until finely chopped.
In a medium saucepan, combine the coconut milk, sugar, lemon zest, and salt. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the vanilla extract, egg yolks, and butter until smooth.
Gradually pour the warm coconut milk mixture into the egg yolk mixture, whisking constantly to prevent the eggs from scrambling.
Return the mixture to the saucepan and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
Remove from heat and stir in the flour to prevent lumps from forming.
Transfer the mixture to a 9-inch springform pan and smooth the top.
Dust the top with a thin layer of flour and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until set.
To serve, remove the pan from the refrigerator and let it sit at room temperature for 30 minutes before slicing and serving.
